title: desmodium gangeticum var. maculatum
intro: Desmodium gangeticum var. maculatum, also known as spotted tick trefoil, is a perennial legume native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Desmodium gangeticum var. maculatum is often prepared as a decoction or powder for use in herbal remedies.
